front: Eu estou me preparando para a entrevista técnica de desenvolvedor.
pronunciation: ew ees-TOY mee preh-pah-RAHN-doo PAH-rah ah eeyn-treh-vee-tah TEHK-nee-kah jee jeh-zehn-vowl-vee-DOHR.
back: I am preparing for the technical developer interview.
context: Stating career advancement objectives using 'entrevista técnica'.

front: O desafio de lógica exige uma abordagem passo a passo.
pronunciation: oo jeh-zah-FEE-oo jee LOH-zhee-kah eh-ZHEE-zhee OO-mah ah-boohr-DAH-zhehyng PAHS-oo ah PAHS-oo.
back: The logic challenge requires a step-by-step approach.
context: Strategizing problem-solving methodologies for assessments.

front: Como posso explicar a complexidade do algoritmo em termos simples?
pronunciation: KOH-moo POH-soo ees-plee-KAHR ah coohm-pleh-kee-DAH-jee doo aw-goo-REET-moo ahyng TEHR-moos SEEYM-plees?
back: How can I explain the algorithm's complexity in simple terms?
context: Querying communication strategies for explaining Big O notation.

front: Eu resolvi o problema usando recursividade, o que otimizou o código.
pronunciation: ew heh-zowl-VEE oo proo-BLEH-mah oo-ZAHN-doo heh-coohr-see-vee-DAH-jee, oo kee oo-chee-mee-ZOY oo KOH-jee-go.
back: I solved the problem using recursion, which optimized the code.
context: Discussing advanced algorithmic design choices using 'recursividade'.

front: A empresa avalia não apenas o código, mas também o raciocínio.
pronunciation: ah eeym-PREH-zah ah-vah-LEE-ah nohng ah-PEH-nahs oo KOH-jee-go, mahs tahm-BEHNG oo hah-syoo-SEE-nyoo.
back: The company evaluates not just the code, but also the reasoning.
context: Highlighting soft skills and mental process visibility in interviews.

front: Eu preciso melhorar minha velocidade de digitação de código.
pronunciation: ew prah-SEE-zoo meh-lyo-RAHR MEENG-yah veh-loo-see-DAH-jee jee jee-zhee-tah-SOHNG jee KOH-jee-go.
back: I need to improve my code typing speed.
context: Optimizing micro-productivity assets for timed technical tasks.

front: Como posso lidar com o nervosismo durante um teste ao vivo?
pronunciation: KOH-moo POH-soo lee-DAHR coong oo nehr-voo-ZEES-moo doo-RAHN-chee oong TEHS-chee ow VEE-voo?
back: How can I deal with nervousness during a live test?
context: Managing performance anxiety in front of interviewers.

front: Eu fiz uma revisão completa da documentação do framework.
pronunciation: ew fees OO-mah heh-vee-ZOHNG coohm-PLEH-tah dah doo-koo-mehn-tah-SOHNG doo framework.
back: I did a complete review of the framework documentation.
context: Preparing technical mastery via systematic knowledge auditing.

front: Qual é a melhor prática para estruturar projetos grandes?
pronunciation: kwaw eh ah meh-LYOHR PRAH-chee-kah PAH-rah ees-troo-too-RAHR proo-ZHEH-toos GRAHN-jees?
back: What is the best practice for structuring large projects?
context: Inquiring about software architecture best practices.

front: Eu utilizo o Debugger para rastrear onde o erro ocorre.
pronunciation: ew oo-tee-LEE-zoo oo Debugger PAH-rah rahs-treh-AHR OHN-jee oo EH-hoo oo-COH-hee.
back: I use the Debugger to track where the error occurs.
context: Stating standard diagnostic tool usage for code fixing.

front: A técnica de 'pair programming' ajuda muito na colaboração.
pronunciation: ah TEHK-nee-kah jee 'pair programming' ah-ZHOO-dah MOOI-too nah coo-lah-boohr-ah-SOHNG.
back: The 'pair programming' technique helps a lot with collaboration.
context: Discussing team-based development workflow patterns.

front: Eu estou praticando algoritmos em um site de desafios técnicos.
pronunciation: ew ees-TOY prah-chee-KAHN-doo aw-goo-REET-moos ahyng oong SIGH-chee jee jeh-zah-FEE-oos TEHK-nee-koos.
back: I am practicing algorithms on a technical challenge site.
context: Describing active skill-building platforms using 'desafios técnicos'.

front: Como posso justificar minhas escolhas de design no sistema?
pronunciation: KOH-moo POH-soo zhoos-chee-fee-KAHR MEENG-yahs ees-KOH-lyahs jee design noo sees-TEH-mah?
back: How can I justify my design choices in the system?
context: Preparing to articulate engineering trade-offs during interview debriefs.

front: Eu aprendi a identificar gargalos de performance no banco.
pronunciation: ew ah-prehn-JEE ah ee-jehn-chee-fee-KAHR gahr-gah-loos jee pehr-fohr-MAHN-see noo BAHN-koo.
back: I learned to identify performance bottlenecks in the database.
context: Highlighting backend optimization experience via 'gargalos'.

front: A comunicação clara é tão importante quanto o código escrito.
pronunciation: ah coo-moo-nee-kah-SOHNG CLAH-rah eh tohng eem-pohr-TAHN-chee KWAHN-too oo KOH-jee-go ees-CREE-too.
back: Clear communication is as important as the written code.
context: Valuing soft skills in engineering roles.

front: Eu preciso me preparar para perguntas sobre minha trajetória.
pronunciation: ew prah-SEE-zoo mee preh-pah-RAHR PAH-rah pehr-GOON-tahs SOH-bree MEENG-yah trah-zheh-TOH-ryah.
back: I need to prepare for questions about my career trajectory.
context: Structuring professional background storytelling for interviews.

front: Qual é a sua estratégia para resolver problemas difíceis?
pronunciation: kwaw eh ah SOO-ah ees-trah-TEH-zhee-ah PAH-rah heh-zowl-VEHR proo-BLEH-mahs jee-FEE-sees?
back: What is your strategy for solving difficult problems?
context: Simulating common open-ended technical behavioral interview questions.

front: Eu usei o conceito de modularização para organizar o código.
pronunciation: ew oo-ZAY oo coohn-SEH-too jee moo-doo-lah-ree-zah-SOHNG PAH-rah oohr-gah-nee-ZAHR oo KOH-jee-go.
back: I used the concept of modularization to organize the code.
context: Defining architecture principles to interviewers.

front: A entrevista teve foco em testes unitários e qualidade.
pronunciation: ah eeyn-treh-vee-tah TEH-vee FOH-koo ahyng TEHS-chees oo-nee-TAH-ryoos ee kwah-lee-DAH-jee.
back: The interview had a focus on unit tests and quality.
context: Reporting assessment topic areas via 'testes unitários'.

front: Como posso demonstrar meu interesse pela empresa?
pronunciation: KOH-moo POH-soo jeh-moohn-STRAHR mew eeyng-teh-REH-see PEH-lah eeym-PREH-zah?
back: How can I demonstrate my interest in the company?
context: Querying interview success strategies regarding company research.

front: Eu estudei os padrões de projeto mais comuns em front-end.
pronunciation: ew ees-too-DAY ooz pah-DROHNGS jee proo-ZHEH-too mays coo-MOOHNS ahyng front-end.
back: I studied the most common design patterns in front-end.
context: Preparing for engineering best practice questions.

front: O feedback da entrevista foi construtivo para meu aprendizado.
pronunciation: oo feedback dah eeyn-treh-vee-tah foy coohn-stroo-TEE-voo PAH-rah mew ah-prehn-jee-ZAH-doo.
back: The interview feedback was constructive for my learning.
context: Reframing interview rejection or outcomes via 'feedback'.

front: Eu fiz um protótipo rápido para validar minha ideia.
pronunciation: ew fees oong proo-TOH-chee-poo HAH-pee-doo PAH-rah vah-lee-DAHR MEENG-yah ee-DEH-yah.
back: I made a quick prototype to validate my idea.
context: Describing agile design/build habits for 'protótipo'.

front: Como posso mostrar minha experiência de forma concisa?
pronunciation: KOH-moo POH-soo MOHS-trahr MEENG-yah eyks-peh-ree-EHN-syah jee FOHR-mah coohn-SEE-zah?
back: How can I show my experience in a concise way?
context: Querying resume and summary pitch refinement.

front: Eu me sinto preparado para qualquer desafio de lógica.
pronunciation: ew mee SEHYN-too preh-pah-RAH-doo PAH-rah KWAW-kehr jeh-zah-FEE-oo jee LOH-zhee-kah.
back: I feel prepared for any logic challenge.
context: Affirming readiness for technical screening. Female speakers use 'preparada'.

front: A análise crítica do código é vital para evitar bugs.
pronunciation: ah ah-NAH-lee-zee KREE-chee-kah doo KOH-jee-go eh vee-TAW PAH-rah ee-vee-TAHR bugs.
back: Critical code analysis is vital to avoid bugs.
context: Defining essential quality control workflows.

front: Eu expliquei como otimizei o fluxo de dados do sistema.
pronunciation: ew ees-plee-KAY KOH-moo oo-chee-mee-ZAY oo FLOO-koo jee DAH-doos doo sees-TEH-mah.
back: I explained how I optimized the system data flow.
context: Recounting high-value interview responses.

front: A cultura da empresa valoriza a aprendizagem contínua.
pronunciation: ah coow-TOO-rah dah eeym-PREH-zah vah-loo-REE-zah ah ah-prehn-jee-ZAH-zhehyng coohn-TEE-noo-ah.
back: The company culture values continuous learning.
context: Articulating company cultural alignment fit.

front: Eu usei testes unitários para garantir a estabilidade do código.
pronunciation: ew oo-ZAY TEHS-chees oo-nee-TAH-ryoos PAH-rah gah-RAHN-chee ah ees-tah-bee-lee-DAH-jee doo KOH-jee-go.
back: I used unit tests to ensure code stability.
context: Demonstrating engineering maturity and quality assurance habits.

front: Como posso me destacar em um processo seletivo concorrido?
pronunciation: KOH-moo POH-soo mee dees-tah-KAHR ahyng oong proo-SEHS-oo seh-leh-CHEE-voo coohn-coohr-HEE-doo?
back: How can I stand out in a competitive selection process?
context: Inquiring about competitive candidate differentiation.

front: Eu apresentei um projeto pessoal que mostra meu nível técnico.
pronunciation: ew ah-preh-zehn-TAY oong proo-ZHEH-too peh-soo-AW kee MOHS-trah mew NEE-vew TEHK-nee-koo.
back: I presented a personal project that shows my technical level.
context: Using project portfolios for candidate validation.

front: O entrevistador perguntou sobre como resolvo conflitos de equipe.
pronunciation: oo eeyn-treh-vee-tah-DOHR pehr-goohn-TOY SOH-bree KOH-moo heh-zowl-VOO coohn-FREE-toos jee ee-KEE-phee.
back: The interviewer asked about how I resolve team conflicts.
context: Preparing for behavioral soft skill assessment questions.

front: Eu estou confiante com minhas habilidades de resolução de problemas.
pronunciation: ew ees-TOY coohn-fy-AHN-chee coong MEENG-yahs ah-bee-lee-DAH-jees jee heh-zoo-loo-SOHNG jee proo-BLEH-mahs.
back: I am confident with my problem-solving skills.
context: Affirming professional confidence in technical reasoning.

front: A dedicação aos estudos me deu uma base sólida em tecnologia.
pronunciation: ah deh-jee-kah-SOHNG owz ees-TOO-doos mee dew OO-mah BAH-zee SOH-lee-dah ahyng tehk-noo-loo-ZHEE-ah.
back: Dedication to studies gave me a solid base in technology.
context: Synthesizing career preparation efforts for interview narratives.

front: Estou animado com as oportunidades de crescimento profissional.
pronunciation: ees-TOY ah-nee-MAH-doo coong ahs oo-pohr-too-nee-DAH-jees jee creh-see-MEHN-too proo-fee-syo-NAW.
back: I am excited about the opportunities for professional growth.
context: Expressing intrinsic career motivation. Female speakers use 'animada'.
